topics.whenToUse: 当题目涉及受伤、意外、交通事故、危险玩耍、无视警告牌等情节时使用。
topics.whenToUseEn: Use when the prompt involves injuries, accidents, traffic incidents, dangerous play, or ignoring warning signs.

signalsFromPrompt.cn: 图中有红绿灯 / 斑马线 / 公路
signalsFromPrompt.en: Picture shows traffic lights / zebra crossing / road

signalsFromPrompt.cn: 图中有“地滑” / “禁止奔跑”等警告牌
signalsFromPrompt.en: Picture shows 'wet floor' / 'no running' warning signs

signalsFromPrompt.cn: 图中有人在走廊奔跑追逐 / 玩火 / 玩电
signalsFromPrompt.en: Picture shows someone running in corridors / playing with fire / playing with electricity

signalsFromPrompt.cn: 图中有人边走边看手机 / 听耳机
signalsFromPrompt.en: Picture shows someone looking at a phone or listening to earphones while walking

recommendedClosings.cn: 经过这次教训，我再也不敢做危险的事了。
recommendedClosings.en: After this lesson, I will never dare to do dangerous things again.

recommendedClosings.cn: 碰到紧急情况时不要慌乱，要冷静处理问题。
recommendedClosings.en: When encountering an emergency, do not panic; handle the problem calmly.

recommendedClosings.cn: 做任何事之前要想后果，千万不要像我一样。
recommendedClosings.en: Think about the consequences before acting, and never make the same mistake as I did.

recommendedClosings.cn: 如果不注意安全，后果将不堪设想。
recommendedClosings.en: If one does not pay attention to safety, the consequences will be unimaginable.

recommendedClosings.cn: 为自己的顽皮和自作主张付出了惨重的代价。
recommendedClosings.en: I paid a heavy price for my naughtiness and acting on my own.

recommendedClosings.cn: 走在路上千万不能玩手机，一定要注意安全。
recommendedClosings.en: Never play with your phone while walking on the road; always pay attention to safety.

recommendedClosings.cn: 以后我们都要小心点才是。
recommendedClosings.en: We must be more careful in the future.

storyArcs.nameCn: 过马路被车撞 / 交通意外

paragraphs.cn: 那是一个阳光明媚的下午，我正走在回家的路上。为了快点到家，我决定一边走路一边掏出手机来玩游戏。
paragraphs.en: It was a bright and sunny afternoon, and I was walking home. To make the time pass faster, I decided to take out my phone and play games while walking.

paragraphs.cn: 我目不转睛地盯着屏幕，完全没有注意到前方的红绿灯已经变成了红灯。我迈着轻盈的步子，直接走上了斑马线。
paragraphs.en: I stared intently at the screen, completely unaware that the traffic light ahead had turned red. With light steps, I walked straight onto the zebra crossing.

paragraphs.cn: 突然，一阵刺耳的刹车声响起，一辆汽车硬生生地停在了我面前。我吓出了一身冷汗，惊得目瞪口呆，手机也掉在了地上。
paragraphs.en: Suddenly, a piercing screech of brakes sounded, and a car stopped abruptly right in front of me. I broke out in a cold sweat, stunned and dumbfounded, and my phone dropped to the ground.

paragraphs.cn: 司机摇下车窗，气呼呼地把我骂得狗血淋头。我满脸羞愧，恨不得地上有个洞让我马上钻进去，连声道歉后飞快地跑回了家。
paragraphs.en: The driver rolled down the window and angrily scolded me severely. My face was full of shame, wishing there was a hole in the ground to hide in, and after apologizing repeatedly, I ran home swiftly.

paragraphs.cn: 经过这次教训，我再也不敢做危险的事了。走在路上千万不能玩手机，如果不注意安全，后果将不堪设想。
paragraphs.en: After this lesson, I will never dare to do dangerous things again. One must never play with a phone while walking on the road; if one does not pay attention to safety, the consequences will be unimaginable.

storyArcs.nameCn: 无视警告牌 / 危险玩耍

paragraphs.cn: 提起那件事，我至今记忆犹新。那天休息节，我和几个朋友在走廊上玩抓人游戏，完全把校规抛到了九霄云外。
paragraphs.en: Mentioning that incident, my memory is still fresh. During recess that day, my friends and I were playing catching in the corridor, completely throwing the school rules out of our minds.

paragraphs.cn: 我们兴奋得手舞足蹈，你追我赶。虽然旁边放着一个“地滑”的警告牌，但我们玩得太开心了，根本没有理会。
paragraphs.en: We were so excited that we danced with joy, chasing each other. Although there was a 'wet floor' warning sign nearby, we were having too much fun and completely ignored it.

paragraphs.cn: 就在我飞一般地冲向前方时，脚下一滑，整个人重重地摔在了地上。我痛得哇哇大哭起来，朋友们也吓得惊慌失措。
paragraphs.en: Just as I rushed forward like flying, my foot slipped, and I fell heavily to the ground. I started crying loudly from the pain, and my friends were frightened into a panic.

paragraphs.cn: 老师闻声赶来，小心翼翼地把我扶去医务室。看着包扎好的伤口，我感到一阵愧疚，低着头吞吞吐吐地向老师自首。
paragraphs.en: Hearing the noise, the teacher rushed over and carefully supported me to the sickbay. Looking at my bandaged wound, I felt a wave of guilt and, with my head lowered, hesitantly confessed to the teacher.

paragraphs.cn: 那是一个令人难忘的教训。我为自己的顽皮和自作主张付出了惨重的代价，以后我一定要注意安全，不再乱跑了。
paragraphs.en: That was an unforgettable lesson. I paid a heavy price for my naughtiness and acting on my own. In the future, I must pay attention to safety and stop running around recklessly.

topics.whenToUse: 当题目涉及遗失物品、忘记带重要东西、考试粗心看错题、因为大意搞砸事情时使用。
topics.whenToUseEn: Use when the prompt involves losing items, forgetting important things, making careless mistakes in exams, or messing things up due to negligence.

signalsFromPrompt.en: Picture shows someone rummaging through a bag / sweating while looking for something

signalsFromPrompt.en: Picture shows someone leaving a place in a hurry

recommendedClosings.cn: 经过这次教训，我再也不敢粗心大意了
recommendedClosings.en: After this lesson, I will never dare to be careless again

recommendedClosings.cn: 提醒自己做事要小心，以免类似事件再次发生
recommendedClosings.en: I remind myself to be careful to prevent similar incidents from happening again

recommendedClosings.cn: 做事绝对不能粗心大意，否则后果不堪设想
recommendedClosings.en: One must never be careless, otherwise the consequences would be unimaginable

recommendedClosings.cn: 我明白了做事必须仔细，绝对不能马虎
recommendedClosings.en: I have learned that one must be careful and absolutely not sloppy

recommendedClosings.cn: 粗心大意只会给自己带来不必要的麻烦
recommendedClosings.en: Carelessness will only bring unnecessary trouble to oneself

recommendedClosings.cn: 我下定决心，一定要改掉粗心大意的坏毛病
recommendedClosings.en: I am determined to get rid of the bad habit of being careless

recommendedClosings.cn: 千万不能因为一时的疏忽而酿成大错
recommendedClosings.en: One must never make a huge mistake due to a moment of negligence

recommendedClosings.cn: 这件事给我敲响警钟，提醒我做事要谨慎
recommendedClosings.en: This incident sounded an alarm for me, reminding me to be cautious

paragraphs.cn: 那是假期里的一天，天气晴朗，凉风阵阵。我带着刚买的新手机去小贩中心吃午餐，心情乐滋滋的。
paragraphs.en: That was a day during the holidays, the weather was clear with gentle cool breezes. I brought my newly bought phone to the hawker centre for lunch, feeling very joyful.

paragraphs.cn: 吃完饭后，我急匆匆地站起来，顺手拎起书包就走，完全没有注意到手机被我遗留在了桌子上。
paragraphs.en: After finishing my meal, I stood up in a hurry, conveniently picked up my bag and left, completely unaware that my phone was left behind on the table.

paragraphs.cn: 到了家，我正想拿手机出来玩，却发现口袋空空的。我急得像热锅上的蚂蚁，吓出了一身冷汗，赶紧跑回小贩中心寻找。
paragraphs.en: When I reached home, I wanted to take out my phone to play, but found my pockets empty. I was as anxious as an ant on a hot pan, broke out in a cold sweat, and quickly ran back to the hawker centre to search.

paragraphs.cn: 幸好，一位好心的清洁工人捡到了我的手机并还给了我。我满脸羞愧，连声对他说谢谢，耳根感到火辣辣的。
paragraphs.en: Fortunately, a kind-hearted cleaner had found my phone and returned it to me. My face was full of shame, I thanked him repeatedly, and my ears felt burning hot.

paragraphs.cn: 这件事给我敲响警钟，提醒我做事要谨慎。粗心大意只会给自己带来不必要的麻烦，我下定决心一定要改掉这个坏毛病。
paragraphs.en: This incident sounded an alarm for me, reminding me to be cautious. Carelessness will only bring unnecessary trouble to oneself, and I am determined to get rid of this bad habit.

storyArcs.nameCn: 忘记带重要物品 / 考试粗心
storyArcs.nameEn: Forgot important item / Careless in exam

paragraphs.cn: 阳光明媚的早晨，我飞一般地冲出家门去上学。因为起得晚，我随便抓起桌上的几本书塞进书包，根本没有仔细检查。
paragraphs.en: On a bright and sunny morning, I rushed out of the house like flying to go to school. Because I woke up late, I casually grabbed a few books from the table and stuffed them into my bag without checking carefully.

paragraphs.cn: 到了学校，老师要求我们交上昨天布置的重要作业。我自信满满地打开书包，却怎么也找不到那份作业。
paragraphs.en: When I arrived at school, the teacher asked us to hand in the important homework assigned yesterday. I opened my bag confidently, but could not find that piece of homework no matter how hard I looked.

paragraphs.cn: 我急得手忙脚乱，把书包翻了个底朝天。这时我才恍然大悟，原来我把它遗忘在了家里的书桌上。我顿时大吃一惊，惊得目瞪口呆。
paragraphs.en: I was in a frantic rush, turning my bag upside down. Then it suddenly dawned on me that I had left it on my study desk at home. I was immediately startled and dumbfounded.

paragraphs.cn: 我只好吞吞吐吐地向老师自首。老师语重心长地批评了我，我感到一阵愧疚，愁眉苦脸地低下了头，心里挺难过的。
paragraphs.en: I had no choice but to hesitantly confess to the teacher. The teacher criticized me earnestly, and I felt a wave of guilt, lowering my head with a sad expression, feeling quite sad inside.

paragraphs.cn: 经过这次教训，我再也不敢粗心大意了。我明白了做事必须仔细，绝对不能马虎，以免类似事件再次发生。
paragraphs.en: After this lesson, I will never dare to be careless again. I have learned that one must be careful and absolutely not sloppy, to prevent similar incidents from happening again.
